description.ko: 삼각형 유리 프리즘을 통과하며 선명한 무지개 빛줄기로 갈라지는 백색광의 매혹적인 모습이 미니멀한 배경 위에 펼쳐집니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing display of white light splitting into a vibrant spectrum as it passes through a triangular glass prism, creating sharp rainbow beams on a minimalist background.

prompt: A macro photography shot of a high-quality glass triangular prism placed on a matte black surface. A single beam of intense white light hits the prism at an angle, refracting into a sharp, brilliant spectrum of rainbow colors (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet). Hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ray tracing, sharp focus on the internal refraction patterns.
